statement: EU support varies dramatically by party affiliation. Among Viðreisn voters, ~90% support EU membership; among Samfylkingin voters, ~75%. Píratar voters show ~55% support, and Left-Green voters ~45%. On the opposing side, Sjálfstæðisflokkur voters show ~25% support, Framsóknarflokkur voters ~20%, Miðflokkur voters ~10%, and Flokkur fólksins voters ~10%. These figures (from late 2025 polling) suggest that the referendum will cut across party lines, with significant minorities within each party diverging from the official party position. The ~25% of Independence Party voters who support membership is particularly significant given that party's large vote share (~22% in recent elections).
source_name: Gallup Ísland — EU support by party affiliation (November 2025)
caveats: Party-based subsamples have larger margins of error. Voters may shift party allegiance before the referendum, particularly if parties take stronger stances. The gap between party leadership positions and voter preferences suggests the referendum outcome will not simply reflect the parliamentary balance of power.

related_entries.statement: Polling data consistently shows that support for EU membership in Iceland is higher among younger voters (18–34: ~55% in favour), urban residents in the capital region (~50%), and those with university education (~52%). Opposition is strongest among older voters (55+: ~50% opposed), rural residents (~55% opposed), and those employed in agriculture and fisheries (~65% opposed).

Samfylkingin (Social Democrats) and Viðreisn (Reform Party) are the two Althingi parties that formally support EU membership. Samfylkingin has supported EU membership since 2007 and led the 2009 application process while in government. Viðreisn was founded in 2016 partly on a pro-EU platform and has consistently advocated for completing accession negotiations. Together they held approximately 17 of 63 Althingi seats after the 2024 elections.

citations.report_title: Að kljúfa þjóðina með tilfinningaþrunginni spurningu

claims.claim_text: Kristrún Frostadóttir sagði að aðildarferli krefðist ofboðslega sterks umboðs og víðtækrar samstöðu í samfélaginu.

citations.report_title: Flott embætti í boði fyrir ESB ríki

claims.claim_text: Samfylkingin, Viðreisn og Flokkur fólksins hafi sett ESB-aðild aftur á dagskrá með fyrirhugaðri þjóðaratkvæðagreiðslu.

citations.report_title: Þjóðin á báðum áttum um viðræður: 52% gegn 48%

claims.claim_text: Kjósendur Viðreisnar og Samfýlkingarinnar eru helst hlynntir þjóðaratkvæðagreiðslu um framhald aðildarviðræðna.
Kjósendur Flokks fólksins eru einnig hlynntir þjóðaratkvæðagreiðslu um framhald aðildarviðræðna.
Kjósendur Miðflokksins og Sjálfstæðisflokksins eru helst andvígir þjóðaratkvæðagreiðslu.
Kjósendur Viðreisnar og Samfýlkingarinnar telja helst að þau myndu kjósa með framhaldi aðildarviðræðna fremur en kjósendur stjórnarandstöðuflokkanna.
Kjósendur Viðreisnar eru hvað hlynntastir þjóðaratkvæðagreiðslunni.
Kjósendur Miðflokksins og Sjálfstæðisflokksins eru andvígastir þjóðaratkvæðagreiðslunni.
Marktækur munur er á afstöðu til þjóðaratkvæðagreiðslunnar eftir afstöðu til ríkisstjórnarinnar.
